caption: A recording of a computer screen shows a spreadsheet and a video player. The spreadsheet lists names and regions, including "BRIAN FRANK ATLANTIC," "BRIAN FRANK* CENTRAL," "Kennard Bolt NORTHWEST," "BRIAN FRANK PACIFIC," "Kyle Barber SOUTHEAST," and "BRIAN FRANK SOUTHWEST." To the right, a video window displays a man with glasses and a beard wearing a black shirt, positioned below a banner for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" and several "JASPYSBREAKS" logos. A red "Subscribe" button with the text "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" appears at the bottom of the video player. Along the bottom of the screen, a red and white banner repeats "WWW.JASPYSCASEBREAKS.COM". Across the sequence, the content remains static, with no visible changes in the text, the man's position, or the overall interface.
